title: Python async concurrency
body: Python async programming keeps API calls non-blocking while handling many requests at once.
author: Alice
text: Python async concurrency. Python async programming keeps API calls non-blocking while handling many requests at once.

title: Java multithreading
body: Java multithreading handles concurrent API requests in worker threads.
author: Bob
text: Java multithreading. Java multithreading handles concurrent API requests in worker threads.

title: ChromaDB persistence
body: A persistent ChromaDB client writes embeddings to disk so collections survive restarts.
author: Chen
text: ChromaDB persistence. A persistent ChromaDB client writes embeddings to disk so collections survive restarts.

title: Pinecone hosted indexes
body: Pinecone is a hosted vector database with serverless indexes managed in the cloud.
author: Dana
text: Pinecone hosted indexes. Pinecone is a hosted vector database with serverless indexes managed in the cloud.

title: Metadata filtering
body: Metadata filters on source, date, category, and author raise precision by removing off-topic chunks.
author: Alice
text: Metadata filtering. Metadata filters on source, date, category, and author raise precision by removing off-topic chunks.

title: Hybrid search
body: Hybrid search combines sparse keyword retrieval with dense vector retrieval and reranks the merged candidates.
author: Eli
text: Hybrid search. Hybrid search combines sparse keyword retrieval with dense vector retrieval and reranks the merged candidates.

title: Cross encoder reranking
body: A cross encoder scores a query and document together, making it slower but often more accurate than bi-encoder retrieval.
author: Sam
text: Cross encoder reranking. A cross encoder scores a query and document together, making it slower but often more accurate than bi-encoder retrieval.

title: Retrieval quality metrics
body: Recall@k checks coverage, precision@k checks returned quality, MRR rewards the first hit, and NDCG uses graded relevance and rank.
author: Priya
text: Retrieval quality metrics. Recall@k checks coverage, precision@k checks returned quality, MRR rewards the first hit, and NDCG uses graded relevance and rank.

title: BM25 sparse search
body: BM25 and TF-IDF are sparse methods that rely on exact token overlap and work well for keyword-heavy queries.
author: Noa
text: BM25 sparse search. BM25 and TF-IDF are sparse methods that rely on exact token overlap and work well for keyword-heavy queries.

title: Dense embeddings
body: Dense vector embeddings capture semantic similarity and can match paraphrases even when exact keywords differ.
author: Noa
text: Dense embeddings. Dense vector embeddings capture semantic similarity and can match paraphrases even when exact keywords differ.

title: Query rewriting
body: Query expansion helps recall, while segmentation and scoping improve precision when the wording is ambiguous.
author: Mina
text: Query rewriting. Query expansion helps recall, while segmentation and scoping improve precision when the wording is ambiguous.

title: Python observability
body: Python logging records structured events and is commonly filtered by source and author in observability systems.
author: Alice
text: Python observability. Python logging records structured events and is commonly filtered by source and author in observability systems.

title: Portfolio diversification
body: Modern portfolio theory optimises risk-adjusted returns by diversifying investments across uncorrelated asset classes such as equities, bonds, and commodities.
author: Riya
text: Portfolio diversification. Modern portfolio theory optimises risk-adjusted returns by diversifying investments across uncorrelated asset classes such as equities, bonds, and commodities.

title: Credit risk scoring
body: Credit risk models estimate the probability of borrower default using financial ratios like debt-to-equity, interest coverage, and operating cash flow.
author: Omar
text: Credit risk scoring. Credit risk models estimate the probability of borrower default using financial ratios like debt-to-equity, interest coverage, and operating cash flow.

title: Earnings per share analysis
body: Earnings per share (EPS) divides net income by outstanding shares and is a primary metric analysts use to compare company profitability across periods.
author: Riya
text: Earnings per share analysis. Earnings per share (EPS) divides net income by outstanding shares and is a primary metric analysts use to compare company profitability across periods.

title: Bond pricing and inflation
body: Rising inflation erodes the purchasing power of fixed coupon payments, pushing bond prices lower as market interest rates increase.
author: Omar
text: Bond pricing and inflation. Rising inflation erodes the purchasing power of fixed coupon payments, pushing bond prices lower as market interest rates increase.

title: Financial regulatory compliance
body: Financial institutions must maintain audit trails, transaction monitoring logs, and regulatory reports to satisfy SOX, Basel III, and AML requirements.
author: Priya
text: Financial regulatory compliance. Financial institutions must maintain audit trails, transaction monitoring logs, and regulatory reports to satisfy SOX, Basel III, and AML requirements.

title: Algorithmic trading strategies
body: Algorithmic trading executes orders using quantitative signals derived from historical price data, volume patterns, and statistical arbitrage models.
author: Dana
text: Algorithmic trading strategies. Algorithmic trading executes orders using quantitative signals derived from historical price data, volume patterns, and statistical arbitrage models.

title: Bloom's taxonomy
body: Bloom's taxonomy organises learning objectives into six cognitive levels: remember, understand, apply, analyse, evaluate, and create, guiding curriculum design and assessment.
author: Mina
text: Bloom's taxonomy. Bloom's taxonomy organises learning objectives into six cognitive levels: remember, understand, apply, analyse, evaluate, and create, guiding curriculum design and assessment.

title: Formative vs summative assessment
body: Formative assessments provide ongoing feedback during instruction so teachers can adjust pacing, while summative assessments evaluate final learning outcomes.
author: Sam
text: Formative vs summative assessment. Formative assessments provide ongoing feedback during instruction so teachers can adjust pacing, while summative assessments evaluate final learning outcomes.

title: Adaptive learning platforms
body: Adaptive learning systems use student performance data to personalise lesson difficulty, pacing, and content recommendations in real time.
author: Mina
text: Adaptive learning platforms. Adaptive learning systems use student performance data to personalise lesson difficulty, pacing, and content recommendations in real time.

title: Curriculum alignment
body: Curriculum alignment ensures that learning objectives, instructional activities, and assessment tasks all address the same standards and competencies.
author: Chen
text: Curriculum alignment. Curriculum alignment ensures that learning objectives, instructional activities, and assessment tasks all address the same standards and competencies.

title: Student engagement metrics
body: Student engagement is measured through attendance rates, assignment submission frequency, discussion participation, and time-on-task analytics.
author: Sam
text: Student engagement metrics. Student engagement is measured through attendance rates, assignment submission frequency, discussion participation, and time-on-task analytics.

title: Clinical decision support
body: Clinical decision support systems retrieve patient history and evidence-based guidelines to recommend treatment options and alert clinicians to drug interactions.
author: Priya
text: Clinical decision support. Clinical decision support systems retrieve patient history and evidence-based guidelines to recommend treatment options and alert clinicians to drug interactions.

title: Electronic health records
body: Electronic health records store structured patient data including diagnoses, medications, lab results, allergies, and visit notes for longitudinal care.
author: Bob
text: Electronic health records. Electronic health records store structured patient data including diagnoses, medications, lab results, allergies, and visit notes for longitudinal care.

title: Contract clause extraction
body: RAG pipelines extract key clauses from legal contracts to surface obligations, deadlines, penalties, and indemnification terms for review teams.
author: Eli
text: Contract clause extraction. RAG pipelines extract key clauses from legal contracts to surface obligations, deadlines, penalties, and indemnification terms for review teams.

title: Regulatory document search
body: Compliance teams use semantic search across thousands of policy documents to find the most relevant regulatory paragraphs for a given business question.
author: Eli
text: Regulatory document search. Compliance teams use semantic search across thousands of policy documents to find the most relevant regulatory paragraphs for a given business question.

title: Product recommendation engines
body: Product recommendation engines combine collaborative filtering with dense embeddings to surface items aligned with a customer purchase and browsing history.
author: Noa
text: Product recommendation engines. Product recommendation engines combine collaborative filtering with dense embeddings to surface items aligned with a customer purchase and browsing history.

title: Customer sentiment analysis
body: Sentiment analysis classifies customer review text as positive, neutral, or negative using dense embeddings trained on labelled review datasets.
author: Noa
text: Customer sentiment analysis. Sentiment analysis classifies customer review text as positive, neutral, or negative using dense embeddings trained on labelled review datasets.
